student_name: Ana Paula Porto de Oliveira Fornazari
hub_subtitle: Inglês do dia a dia — apresentar-se, rotina e conversação

lesson.menu_desc: Narrating a memorable trip with past continuous and past simple -- 32 slides
lesson.subtitle: Lesson 5 -- A Memorable Trip
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Ana Paula Porto de Oliveira Fornazari | Lesson 5 -- A Memorable Trip

listenings.text: It was the best trip of my life. Two years ago, I traveled to the south of Chile with two friends. On the first morning, the sun was rising over the mountains while we were driving along the coast. The scenery was breathtaking. Around noon, we stopped in a small fishing village and wandered through the narrow streets. Suddenly, while we were buying a souvenir, it started to rain very hard. We ran into a tiny cafe, and the owner told us wonderful stories about the region. It was raining all afternoon, but we did not mind at all. That evening, when the storm finally stopped, we watched an unforgettable sunset over the water.

Hi Ana Paula, it is Sarah! You will not believe my week. I am calling from Portugal. Yesterday was incredible. In the morning, while I was walking along the coast, I found a beautiful old lighthouse. The landscape was amazing. Then, around lunchtime, I got lost in the old town, but a kind woman helped me. In the afternoon, while I was doing some sightseeing near the river, it started to rain, so I bought a small souvenir and waited in a cafe. When the sky cleared, I watched the most beautiful sunset. It was a truly unforgettable day. Call me back soon. Bye!

extra_audio.text: Say where and when you traveled. Describe the scenery and what you were doing. Tell what happened suddenly. Explain how you felt in that moment. Say why the trip was unforgettable.
